exploreUrl:
<js>
var params='';
var mood=['烦躁','悲伤','孤独','已弃疗','减压','无奈','快乐','感动','迷茫'];
var place=['睡前','旅行','散步','坐车','独处','失恋','失眠','无聊','随便'];
var url='::/tagshow?p={{page}}&page={{page}}&n='
for(i in mood)<
     params=params+'心情·'+mood[i]+url+mood[i]+'
';
>
for(j in place)<
     params=params+'场景·'+place[j]+url+place[j]+'
';
>
params
</js>
